name: JsonApi

values.name: attributes
values.comment: Encodes the "attribute" node of a JSON API conformant payload

values.name: dataEncoder
values.comment: Encodes the root "data" node of a JSON API conformant payload

values.name: encodeId
values.comment: Encodes the "id" attribute of a JSON API conformant payload

values.name: encodePatch
values.comment: Creates the correct payload for PATCH requests to a JSON API endpoint
values.type: String -> Int -> List ( String, Value ) -> List ( String, Value ) -> Value

values.name: encodePost
values.comment: Creates the correct payload for POST requests to a JSON API endpoint
values.type: String -> List ( String, Value ) -> List ( String, Value ) -> Value

values.name: jsonApiType
values.comment: Encodes the "type" attribute of a JSON API conformant payload

values.name: listDecoder
values.comment: Decode a payload where objects are delivered in a list

values.name: relationship
values.comment: Specify a relationship attribute that is expected in the incoming payload

values.name: relationships
values.comment: Encodes the "relationships" node of a JSON API conformant payload

values.name: requiredHeaders
values.comment: Adds the correct headers for JSON API conformant request to an Http.Request object

values.name: root
values.comment: Access the root "data" object of a JsonApi payload
